metadata.source_text: The Linux kernel version 5.15.0 contains a use-after-free vulnerability in the netfilter subsystem. A local attacker can exploit this flaw to escalate privileges. The issue was reported by Google Proj

properties.TEXT: The Linux kernel version 5.15.0 contains a use-after-free vulnerability in the netfilter subsystem. A local attacker can exploit this flaw to escalate privileges. The issue was reported by Google Proj
The Linux kernel version 5.15.0 contains a use-after-free vulnerability in the netfilter subsystem.
The Linux kernel version 5.15.0 contains a use-after-free vulnerability in the netfilter subsystem.
A local attacker can exploit this flaw to escalate privileges.
The issue was reported by Google Project Zero and has been assigned CVE-2023-1234 with a CVSS score of 7.8/10.
Users should upgrade to version 5.15.1 to mitigate this risk.
